# Harishankar K

Harishankar K is a hybrid visual designer in India focused on branding, graphic design, packaging, social media creatives, campaign visuals, print design, and motion graphics.

Website: https://harishankar.co.in/
Portfolio: https://www.behance.net/Harishankar_K
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/harishankar-k-1072b5232/
Email: k.harish2323@gmail.com
Phone: +91 99524 55048

## Services

- Brand identity design
- Graphic design
- Packaging design
- Social media creative design
- Motion graphics
- Campaign visual design
- Print and display design

## Portfolio Categories

- Social Media Creatives
- Brochure and Pamphlets
- Banner and Mockups
- Banners and Posters
- Motion Graphics
- Animation

## Brand Experience

Harishankar K has worked across agency and brand environments, including experience with Rhino Creative Agency and visual work for brands such as Tata Steel BlueScope, Coromandel, Mizaj, G Square, Aranyakaa Farms, and Elegance Enterprises.
